name.description: Layout name. Routes reference this via `layout: "<name>"`.

template.description: HTML template under `templates/`. Same lookup rules as page templates.

process.description: Process blocks. Each entry is dispatched against the registry under `src/blocks/` — same surface as `route.process`.

RequireType.description: Subset of model field types currently allowed in `layout.requires`. Kept small on purpose; the schema can grow when real use cases appear.
